recipe.title: Jamie's South Indian prawn curry
recipe.description: A quick and easy Indian prawn curry recipe from Jamie Oliver. This curry is ready in just 25 minutes, so it's a real weeknight winner. Great with naan bread

ingredients.name: ½ x 400g tin of light coconut milk

steps.descr: Fill a medium pan with salted water, place over a high...
steps.instructions: Fill a medium pan with salted water, place over a high heat and bring to a boil.

on_enter.say: Fill a medium pan with salted water, place over a high heat and bring to a boil.

steps.descr: Peel and finely slice the garlic and onion, then peel...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely slice the garlic and onion, then peel and finely grate the ginger. Halve and deseed the chilli, then finely slice. Roughly chop the tomatoes.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely slice the garlic and onion, then peel and finely grate the ginger. Halve and deseed the chilli, then finely slice. Roughly chop the tomatoes.

steps.descr: Add the rice to the boiling water and cook for 10...
steps.instructions: Add the rice to the boiling water and cook for 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain in a sieve, then return to the warm pan, cover with a lid and set aside off the heat.

on_enter.say: Add the rice to the boiling water and cook for 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain in a sieve, then return to the warm pan, cover with a lid and set aside off the heat.

steps.descr: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a medium pan over a medium...
steps.instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a medium pan over a medium heat, add the mustard seeds, garam masala and turmeric, then fry for 1 minute.

on_enter.say: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a medium pan over a medium heat, add the mustard seeds, garam masala and turmeric, then fry for 1 minute.

steps.descr: Add the onion, garlic and ginger, then fry for 10...
steps.instructions: Add the onion, garlic and ginger, then fry for 10 minutes, or until softened. Add the chilli, tomatoes and a splash of water, then turn the heat up and cook for a further 3 minutes.

on_enter.say: Add the onion, garlic and ginger, then fry for 10 minutes, or until softened. Add the chilli, tomatoes and a splash of water, then turn the heat up and cook for a further 3 minutes.

steps.descr: Next, add the prawns and coconut milk, bring to the boil...
steps.instructions: Next, add the prawns and coconut milk, bring to the boil then reduce the heat slightly and simmer gently for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the prawns are just cooked.

on_enter.say: Next, add the prawns and coconut milk, bring to the boil then reduce the heat slightly and simmer gently for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the prawns are just cooked.

steps.descr: Stir through the spinach and cook for a further 1 to 2...
steps.instructions: Stir through the spinach and cook for a further 1 to 2 minutes until the spinach has wilted.

on_enter.say: Stir through the spinach and cook for a further 1 to 2 minutes until the spinach has wilted.

steps.instructions: Divide the rice between plates. Season the prawn curry to taste with salt, black pepper and a squeeze of lime juice, then ladle the curry onto the rice. Serve with the remaining lime, cut into wedges for squeezing over.

on_enter.say: Divide the rice between plates. Season the prawn curry to taste with salt, black pepper and a squeeze of lime juice, then ladle the curry onto the rice. Serve with the remaining lime, cut into wedges for squeezing over.
